{{Quote|There it is! Gastrula!|Captain Bungo Bung on approach to Gastrula in the ''Chubby Gundark''|<ref name="Carry Out" />}}
'''Gastrula''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Gastrulan]] [[Species/Legends|species]], it was the terminus of the short-lived [[Great Bantha Breakfast Biscuit Run]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bungo Bung]] had established the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade route]] in an effort to make [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] by selling the popular [[Foodstuff/Legends|snack]] [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s to the locals. However, when combined with certain elements in the [[Atmosphere/Legends|environment]] of Gastrula, preservatives in the biscuits caused the snacks to mutate into the [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]. The resulting lifeform was a ravenous creature that set out to consume the entire planet.

==Description==
Gastrula was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Carry Out" /> located in the [[Gastrula system/Legends|Gastrula system]] in the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Gastrulan]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. At least two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the world, and it had an atmosphere that could support [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]]-based lifeforms such as [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]]. The environment also reacted with the preservatives used in [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s—a popular snack marketed by the restaurant chain [[Biscuit Baron]]—which resulted in the mutation of the foodstuff into the [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]], a ravenous amoeboid creature resembling a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]].<ref name="Carry Out" />

==History==
[[File:Gastrulan.jpg|thumb|right|A Gastrulan]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Gastrula became the terminus of the [[Great Bantha Breakfast Biscuit Run]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade route]] established by the Sullustan [[Bungo Bung]] and his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[42-RST]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Bung made several runs to the world, shipping the popular snack [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] known as Bantha Breakfast Biscuits aboard his [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Chubby Gundark]]'', after realizing that there were many worlds that had no access to the snack. Importing them from the planet [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], Bung made several hundred thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] over a two [[Standard week/Legends|week]] period. However, unknown to both the crew of the ''Chubby Gundark'' or the Gastrulans, certain preservatives used in creating Bantha Breakfast Biscuits reacted negatively with Gastrula's atmosphere. The interaction of the two elements caused the Bantha Breakfast Biscuits to mutate into the Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit. This amoeboid lifeform was a ravenous creature that sought to devour anything in its path. At least one of these creatures evolved on Gastrula, and began eating everything it could find.<ref name="Carry Out" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Main|Gastrulan}}
Gastrula was home to the Gastrulans. They were a race of four-armed<ref name="Carry Out" /> [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] gastropods<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|327|Gastrula}}</ref> with spotted, bulbous heads that had eyestalks protruding from either side.<ref name="Carry Out" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gastrula was created by [[James Anderson|Jim Anderson]] for his comic strip ''[[Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out]]'', which appeared in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|issue 11]] of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal]] published by [[West End Games]] in [[1996]].
